subcodes.first_line: O friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! A thousand thanks be unto the Self-Sufficing Lord, that ye are companions in servitude at His sacred Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء هزاران شکر حضرت بی نیاز را که در عبودیت آستان مقدس همراز
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual transformation, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
